SEARCH
Package io.github.fiitgame.Player

Class Archer

java.lang.Object
io.github.fiitgame.Player.Player
io.github.fiitgame.Player.Archer
public class Archer extends Player
Archer class that has medium health and damage, but can attack from a distance. Has a limited number of arrows and needs to reload after using them all.

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • Archer

      public Archer(boolean initialiseGraphics)
      Main constructor. Initialises arrows
      Parameters:

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(float delta)
      Update method that calculates logic depending on time
      Overrides:
      update in class Player
      Parameters:
      delta - time

    • handleAttackInput

      protected void handleAttackInput()
      Function to handle attack input. If left mouse button is pressed, it tries to attack and add the archer projectile(arrow) to projectiles.
      Specified by:
      handleAttackInput in class Player

    • attack

      public Projectile attack() throws AttackException
      Attack function that creates mage projectile in dirrection of the mouse cursor
      Specified by:
      attack in class Player
      Returns:
      arrow projectile that is negatively accelerating, until it "falls"
      Throws:
      AttackException - throws cooldown exception if attack is on cooldown, or if archer is out of arrows and needs to reload

    • levelUp

      protected void levelUp()
      Increases arrow pocket size if level is up
      Overrides:
      levelUp in class Player
